engine.backendNote: LocalMaxxing currently rejects xpu/sycl/rpc backend values; submitted without backend and recorded Level Zero/RPC details in engineFlags.extraFlags.

abComparison.interpretation: Small quality-preserving improvement, but within normal MiniMax r3 variance. Keep support because it removes an unsupported-op gap and is not slower in r3.

commandSnippet: GGML_DISABLE_FUSED_RMS_NORM=1 llama-bench -m MiniMax-M2.7-UD-IQ4_XS-00001-of-00004.gguf -rpc 127.0.0.1:50100|0,127.0.0.1:50101|0,127.0.0.1:50102|0,127.0.0.1:50103|0 -p 0 -n 64 -r 3 -ngl 99 -sm layer -ts 1/1/1/1 -fa 0 -nkvo 0 -ub 32 -ctk f16 -ctv f16 -t 4 -w 0 -mmp 1 -rtr 1 -fmoe 1 -no-mmad 0 -muge 1 -sas 0 -o json
notes: Adds SYCL RPC worker support for GGML_OP_FUSED_MUL_UNARY. The implementation supports f32 same-shape GELU/RELU/SILU and f32 row-gate SILU/SIGMOID, matching the CPU op patterns MiniMax uses. Fused RMSNorm remains disabled because it was functional but neutral/slower. This does not change weights, quantization, KV dtype, sampler, or expert selection.
